form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr4) over 1680m at this track beaten 3.5 m by Mista Eagle (2:02.40) in NR 60 to 64 on April 4 at $5.50. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 2090m at Hobart, beaten 5.5 m by Harrys Deal (2:36.00) in 3yo+ NMT 5 LTW's on March 25 at $2.90. Will be right in the thick of things.
